overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a character leading a horse along a rural path at night. The journey progresses from an open railroad corridor into a dense, atmospheric forest with a distant campfire.

agents.ego_description: leading a saddled horse by the reins along a dirt path beside railroad tracks

notable_agents.action: walking calmly alongside the character, being led by the reins

entered.detail: metal railroad tracks running parallel to the dirt path
wooden utility pole with crossbars and wires
deciduous trees with dark foliage lining the path

segments.scene_description: Walking along a dirt path parallel to railroad tracks at night. The character leads a saddled horse through an open area with telegraph poles and scattered trees under a cloudy sky.

events.description: character moves away from railroad tracks into denser woodland area

agents.ego_description: continuing to lead the horse uphill through grassy terrain with increasing tree cover

entered.detail: inclined terrain covered with tall grass
thicker cluster of trees creating partial canopy cover

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the tracks into a grassy woodland slope. The tree density increases as the character continues leading the horse uphill through the terrain, with the railroad fading into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense foggy forest with abandoned wagon

events.description: entering a fog-filled forest with significantly reduced visibility
encountering a second horse near a campfire in the forest clearing

agents.ego_description: cautiously leading the horse through the dark forest toward a distant campfire

notable_agents.action: horse slowing down and reacting to the presence of another horse
second horse standing near the campfire in the forest clearing

entered.detail: derelict wooden wagon with broken wheels partially hidden by trees
warm orange glow flickering through the trees indicating a fire
thick overhead tree cover blocking all sky visibility

segments.scene_description: Entering a dense, foggy forest with limited visibility. An abandoned wagon appears on the right as the character approaches a distant campfire, where a second horse stands in the clearing, causing the led horse to react.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open railroad corridor into the depths of a dense, atmospheric forest at night. It begins along a dirt path parallel to railroad tracks, moving past telegraph poles and scattered trees under a cloudy sky. As the character leads the horse away from the tracks, the scene shifts toward a grassy woodland slope where the tree density increases and the railroad fades into the background. The environment then transitions into a thick, foggy forest with limited visibility, passing an abandoned wagon on the right. Finally, the camera approaches a distant campfire in a clearing where a second horse stands, prompting a reaction from the led horse.
